description: README.md is the public-facing summary of the architecture that SPEC.md specifies in full; both restate the same facts: GitHub Pages hosting with the repo named rootdrew27.github.io, deploy on push to master via .github/workflows/deploy.yml, Pages Source set to GitHub Actions, and the blog frontmatter fields. Changing any of these in SPEC.md requires updating README.md so the two docs do not contradict each other.
